title: Zombie Potion
description: Zombie transformation potion with unique survival mechanics
body:
# 🧪 Zombie Potion

**Temporarily become a zombie by drinking a custom potion. Burn in sunlight. Get ignored by hostile mobs. Feast on rotten flesh. Survive like the undead.**

Zombie Potion is a lightweight, survival-friendly mod that lets players **enter a “zombie state”** by drinking a special potion.  
While zombified, you'll behave like a vanilla zombie — both its strengths and weaknesses.

---

## ✅ Features

- 🧪 **Zombie Potion**  
  Drink it to become a zombie indefinitely (until cured or killed)

- 🧟‍♂️ **Zombie State Effects**:
  - 🧢 Automatically equips a **zombie head** for visual immersion
  - ☀️ Burn in daylight like a real zombie
  - 😶 Hostile mobs (zombies, skeletons, creepers, etc.) won’t target you
  - 🧄 Cure the state by drinking milk or upon death
  - 🥩 Rotten flesh becomes nutritious (like cooked beef)
  - 🍞 Normal food gives Hunger instead!
  - 🎙️ Random zombie groan sounds every 5–10 seconds

---

## 🔧 Configuration

This mod includes a simple config file to adjust:
- Groan sound frequency
- Visual effects toggle (zombie head, particles, etc.)
- Food behavior

---

## 🛠 Compatibility

- Minecraft: **1.20**
- Loader: **Forge 47.x**
- Multiplayer: ✅
- Modpack-friendly: ✅

---

## 📦 How to Install

1. Download the `.jar` file from the **Versions** tab
2. Place it into your `mods/` folder
3. Launch the game using **Forge 47.4**

---

## 🙌 License & Usage

This mod is open-source under the MIT license.  
Feel free to include it in modpacks, videos, or server builds — credit is appreciated!

---

🧪 Questions or bugs? Visit the [GitHub repo]([https://github.com/your/repo](https://github.com/yamataka22/minecraft-zombie-potion)) or leave a comment here on Modrinth!
